slos.name: Chat response latency p95
slos.description: p95 time from user message to first token of agent response. Clara is a real-time receptionist — slow responses break the conversational UX.
slos.dataSource: Next.js API route timing in /api/chat — log start/end timestamps

slos.name: Tool call success rate
slos.description: Fraction of HubSpot and Calendar tool calls that succeed without error. Failures leave leads unrecorded or bookings unbooking.
slos.dataSource: Tool call result logging in agent/tools.ts

slos.name: Booking confirmation rate
slos.description: Fraction of attempted calendar bookings where Google Calendar confirmation is received. Failures mean the lead believes they booked but didn't.
slos.dataSource: CLARA_CONFIRM_BOOKING gate + calendar tool response tracking

slos.name: HubSpot contact creation success rate
slos.description: Fraction of attempted HubSpot contact upserts that succeed. Failed writes lose lead data permanently.
slos.dataSource: CLARA_CONFIRM_HUBSPOT_WRITE gate + HubSpot tool response tracking

note: Clara is Iterate-phase — no live traffic yet. SLOs defined for when first users arrive. Targets are estimates based on similar chatbot benchmarks; ratchet after first 100 conversations.
